ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND (bpats__Post_Externally__c = True, OR ( ISBLANK ( Facility_Name__c ), ISBLANK ( Facility_Title_Lookup__c ), ISBLANK ( Monthly_Hours_Requested__c ), ISBLANK ( Text (Open_to_Residents__c )), ISBLANK ( Text (Planned_Status__c )), ISBLANK ( Text (Vacancy_Reason__c ) ), ISBLANK ( bpats__Number_of_Openings__c ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For an external job, fill in: Facility Name, Facility Title, Monthly Hours Requested, Open To Residents?, Planned Status, Vacancy Reason, Number of Openings.
